summary: Testing iteration 39: RBAC changes verified - Super Admin now blocked from tenant-specific routes (products, customers). All 18 tests passed. RBAC now uses get_tenant_admin/require_tenant which reject users without tenant_id in JWT.
critical_code_review_comments: RBAC dependencies correctly implemented: get_tenant_admin and require_tenant reject users without tenant_id
Arabic error message 'هذا الإجراء متاح فقط لمشتركي المنصة' properly returned for Super Admin accessing tenant routes
Super Admin can still access SaaS management routes (tenants, plans, monitoring)
get_admin_user still allows Super Admin for user management (GET /api/users)
Monitoring endpoint properly aggregates data from all tenant databases
seed_data_creation: Test products and customers created then cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC changes verified. Super Admin is blocked from: POST /api/products (403), GET /api/products (403), GET /api/customers (403). Super Admin CAN access: /api/saas/tenants, /api/saas/plans, /api/saas/monitoring, /api/users. Tenant data isolation still works correctly.

rbac_super_admin_blocked_post_products.notes: Returns 403 with Arabic message 'هذا الإجراء متاح فقط لمشتركي المنصة'

cross_tenant_isolation.notes: Tenant B cannot see Tenant A's products

super_admin_monitoring.notes: Returns tenant stats with summary (total_tenants, total_products, total_revenue)

tenant_login.notes: Returns user_type=tenant with JWT containing tenant_id

rbac_architecture_notes.get_tenant_admin: Requires tenant_id in JWT - used for tenant write operations (products, customers, etc.)
rbac_architecture_notes.require_tenant: Requires tenant_id in JWT - used for tenant read operations
rbac_architecture_notes.get_admin_user: Allows super_admin and admin roles - used for user management
rbac_architecture_notes.get_super_admin: Requires super_admin role only - used for SaaS management routes
rbac_architecture_notes.arabic_error_message: هذا الإجراء متاح فقط لمشتركي المنصة
